content.summaryText: Coordinating Urgent Referral in Crisis Intervention focuses on immediate safety planning and de-escalation. Primary objective: Prepare referral summary.

content.questionText: In Coordinating Urgent Referral, which action best supports 'Prepare referral summary'?
content.explanation: Correct answers prioritize patient safety, reassessment, and timely escalation.

options.text: Reduce stimulation, use simple language, and define immediate safety steps
Arguing with a distressed patient instead of stabilizing first
Delay reassessment until symptoms are severe
Use treatment decisions without baseline documentation

content.summaryText: Immediate priority: reduce stimulation, use simple language, and define immediate safety steps. Practical emphasis: Hand over critical risk details.

content.questionText: Escalation is required when imminent self-harm risk, violence risk, or inability to maintain safety.
content.explanation: Early escalation reduces preventable deterioration and delays in definitive care.

content.sentence:
Start with <1> to establish baseline status.
Use <2> to deliver standardized intervention.
Document <3> to support continuity and quality review.
